name: Webflow
description: Visual website builder with CMS capabilities and no-code design tools

description.value: Visual website builder with CMS capabilities and no-code design tools

cms-type.comment: Visual builder with coupled frontend plus MACH-certified headless APIs for external consumption

primary-language.comment: SaaS platform; Webflow Cloud supports Next.js and Astro deployments

api-type.comment: REST API only (v2); no native GraphQL support

static-site-generation.comment: Webflow generates static pages served via CDN

edge-deployment.comment: Fastly CDN for global edge delivery

content-types.comment: CMS Collections allow custom content structures

field-types.comment: Plain text, rich text, image, multi-image, video, link, email, phone, number, date/time, reference, multi-reference, color, option, switch fields

content-relationships.comment: Reference and multi-reference fields for one-to-one and one-to-many relationships

nested-components.comment: 2025 update added nested collection lists up to 3 levels deep

localization.comment: End-to-end localization with hreflang support; add-on pricing ($9-29/mo)

embedded-interactives.comment: Rich text supports embedded media from YouTube, Vimeo, Google Maps, SlideShare, SoundCloud, Giphy, etc.

draft-publish.comment: Draft changes without impacting live content; auto-save for drafts

scheduled-publishing.comment: Granular publishing controls for scheduling content

approval-workflows.comment: Approvals and publishing workflows; Growth workspace plan and above

audit-logging.comment: Audit logs API available on Enterprise plans only

external-media-storage.comment: Media stored on Webflow infrastructure; no native S3/Cloudinary integration

video-support.comment: Video field for YouTube, Vimeo, Dailymotion URLs

role-based-access.comment: Full and Limited seat types with different permissions

granular-permissions.comment: Custom roles and permissions on Enterprise plans

sso-saml.comment: OAuth and SAML SSO on Enterprise Workspace plans only

audience-restrictions.comment: Memberships 2.0 supports tiered access and gated content

typescript-sdk.comment: JavaScript SDK with TypeScript support; Python SDK also available

content-type-sdk.comment: Collections defined via visual designer UI, not code

cli-tools.comment: CLI available for Webflow Cloud deployments; MCP server for LLM integration

local-development.comment: Webflow Cloud enables local development with Next.js/Astro; DevLink for component sync

webhooks.comment: Webhooks for content and site events with signature verification

plugin-system.comment: Webflow Apps marketplace; Designer and Data API extensions

admin-ui-customization.comment: Editor UI is fixed; limited to styling options

documentation-quality.comment: Comprehensive developer portal, Webflow University with video courses, API reference

frontend-frameworks.comment: Webflow Cloud supports Next.js and Astro via DevLink component sync

search-integration.comment: Site search included on CMS plan and above

ecommerce-integration.comment: Native Webflow Ecommerce with Stripe; Ecommerce API for custom integrations

analytics-integration.comment: Webflow Analyze add-on ($9/mo); GA and other integrations supported

ai-features.comment: Webflow AI for content generation, site building, SEO optimization; announced at Webflow Conf 2025

cdn-included.comment: Fastly CDN with global edge delivery

response-caching.comment: Content Delivery APIs served through CDN with built-in caching

rate-limits.comment: 60 rpm for Basic, 120 rpm for CMS/Business/Ecommerce, variable for Enterprise

global-regions.comment: Fastly CDN provides global edge locations

free-tier.comment: Starter plan: webflow.io domain, 2 pages, 50 CMS items, 1GB bandwidth

pricing-model.comment: Site plans: Free, $14-39/mo; Workspace plans: Free, $19-49/mo; Additional seats $15-39/mo; Usage-based add-ons

enterprise-features.comment: SSO/SAML, SCIM provisioning, custom roles, audit logs, SOC 2 Type II, enhanced DDoS protection, SLA
